---
title: Adapters
description: Available storage backends for @justwant/cache.
icon: Server
---

## What are adapters?

Adapters implement the `CacheAdapter` interface. The core has no knowledge of any storage — you inject an adapter at creation time.

```ts
interface CacheAdapter {
  get(key: string): Promise<CacheEntry | null>;
  set(key: string, entry: CacheEntry): Promise<void>;
  delete(key: string): Promise<void>;
  has(key: string): Promise<boolean>;
  clear(): Promise<void>;
  invalidateTag?(tag: string): Promise<void>;
  keys?(prefix?: string): Promise<string[]>;
}
```

## Available adapters

| Adapter | Package | Use case |
|---------|---------|----------|
| [Memory](/docs/cache/memory) | `@justwant/cache/adapters/memory` | Development, tests |
| [Redis](/docs/cache/redis) | `@justwant/cache/adapters/redis` | Production, multi-node |
| [Upstash](/docs/cache/upstash) | `@justwant/cache/adapters/upstash` | Serverless, edge |
| [Cloudflare KV](/docs/cache/cf-kv) | `@justwant/cache/adapters/cf-kv` | Cloudflare Workers |
| [Vercel KV](/docs/cache/vercel-kv) | `@justwant/cache/adapters/vercel-kv` | Vercel deployments |
| [Tiered](/docs/cache/tiered) | `@justwant/cache/adapters/tiered` | L1 + L2 with promotion |

## Choosing an adapter

- **Development / tests** — `memory`: zero dependencies, volatile, no infrastructure needed.
- **Production, single or multi-node** — `redis` or `upstash`: shared persistent storage.
- **Cloudflare Workers** — `cf-kv`: uses the bound KV namespace.
- **Vercel** — `vercel-kv`: wraps `@vercel/kv` (backed by Upstash).
- **High-throughput with warm local hits** — `tiered`: L1 memory + L2 Redis.

## Custom adapter

Implement `CacheAdapter` to integrate any storage backend:

```ts
import type { CacheAdapter, CacheEntry } from "@justwant/cache";

const myAdapter: CacheAdapter = {
  async get(key) { /* ... */ },
  async set(key, entry) { /* ... */ },
  async delete(key) { /* ... */ },
  async has(key) { /* ... */ },
  async clear() { /* ... */ },
};

const cache = createCache({ adapter: myAdapter });
```
